basic_details.organization_name: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union Ltd (WAMUL)
basic_details.short_information: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union Ltd (WAMUL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official WAMUL website. The last date to submit the application form is 09-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation may be given in case of appropriate or outstanding candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum one year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy or FMCG only.
qualification.details: Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum one year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy or FMCG only.

salary_details.details: CTC Rs. 4.55 lakhs per annum including P.F & other Contributions.

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WAMUL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum one year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy or FMCG only.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the WAMUL Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) recruitment is 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized Institute or University to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for the Assistant - Sales & Distribution role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of one year of full-time working experience in Sales & Distribution, specifically within the Dairy or FMCG sector, is mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant - Sales & Distribution post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a Cost to Company (CTC) of Rs. 4.55 lakhs per annum, which includes Provident Fund and other contributions.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant - Sales & Distribution position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant - Sales & Distribution (Ambient Segment) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this WAMUL recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official WAMUL website.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification, a Written Test, and a Personal Interview to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided there.
